name: Tea-Smoked Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove tea from bags and mix with the next five ingredients.
2. Cover the bottom of a large, shallow foil-lined baking pan with the mixture.
3. Place the turkey thighs, skin side up, on a rack over the tea mixture.
4. Cover the pan with foil and bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour.
5. Meanwhile, mix the remaining three ingredients in a separate bowl.
6. Brush each thigh thoroughly with half of the mixture.
7. Bake uncovered for 20 minutes, skin side down.
8. Turn the thighs over and brush with the remaining mixture.
9. Continue baking for another 30 minutes, or until juices run clear when pierced with a fork.
10. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
